character.description: cute evolution blessing icons for a cozy slime clicker game, each icon is a small magical boon charm

elastic.action: bouncy pastel jelly yo-yo charm icon, springy string coil, combo head-start blessing

luckytip.action: four-leaf clover sealed inside a translucent jelly drop icon, lucky perfect-click blessing

sparkfinger.action: tiny star-tipped wand icon with two sparkles, click power blessing

comboKeep.action: small festival drum icon with rhythmic echo ring marks, combo duration blessing

firststep.action: cute paw footprint stepping stone icon with tiny grass, friend discount blessing

quietrich.action: sleeping coin pouch icon with closed happy eyes, passive production blessing

cheapup.action: jelly price tag icon with a playful scissors cut mark, upgrade discount blessing

starhunch.action: small brass telescope icon pointed at one gold star, star frequency blessing

starlonger.action: candle lantern icon holding a small gold star inside, star linger blessing

partylong.action: confetti party horn icon with two curled streamers, buff duration blessing

minirain.action: cluster of three tiny shooting stars icon with short trails, mini star blessing

napecon.action: crescent moon pillow icon with one sleep bubble, offline reward blessing

dustsense.action: open rounded palm icon catching falling stardust specks, wish reward blessing

slowcrown.action: small gold crown resting on a snail shell icon, slow but steady evolution blessing

soulwhisper.action: translucent pink jelly soul wisp icon with one sparkle, bonus soul blessing

warmstart.action: tiny campfire icon with a heart-shaped flame, all-round warm start blessing

style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution game sprite, compact chibi/mascot-friendly proportions when the base allows it, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, clear limbs, and no detail that disappears at small runtime size. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
